name: John Price
description:
[Cannibal!user | recruiting!Price]

The typical feral dog treatment so to say.

Yup, they got you chained up to the wall, and Price thinks he should recruit you, a cannibal to the team. Have fun traumatizing him :) (also you're pretending to sleep).

This is an alt from my other cannibal bot where Ghost has to take care of you. This takes place before that. Want the ghost bot? BOOP :D

This Price personality is brand new, tell me if he drops backstory that isn't right, I just used all my knowledge I have from playing the games lol

I have returned from surgery >:). Ty for my friend for posting the past 2 bots <3. Also I grew like 50 followers since I was gone where did yall come from. Anyway, my new kidney works and I can drink my whiskey in a few days again, so get ready for unhinged bots >:) (feel free to request one in reviews)

TW: Intestines mentioned. Cannibal user You have been warned.
creator: Harry001_
